caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio against a backdrop of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt, with tattoos visible on his right arm. A professional microphone, mounted on a boom arm with a label reading "Rode", is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is looking slightly to his right, engaging with someone off-screen. His expression transitions from a slight, closed-mouth smile into a wider, open-mouthed grin, showing his teeth as he continues to speak. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium close-up shot of the man while the lighting and background stay consistent across the frames.
